description.ko: 백색광이 투명한 결정을 통과하며 고유의 색상들로 분리되는 빛의 물리적 현상을 고해상도로 시각화한 작품입니다.
description.en: A high-fidelity visualization of light physics, showcasing the moment white light splits into its constituent colors through a crystalline medium.

prompt: A hyper-realistic, macro cinematic shot of a sharp-edged glass prism on a clean, dark surface. A single beam of pure white light enters the prism and disperses into a vivid, wide rainbow spectrum. Subtle chromatic aberration, intricate light caustics on the surface, 8k resolution, highly detailed glass texture, ethereal atmosphere.
